title: Resilience and the Lost Gems
overview: Eleven-year-old adventurer, "Rizzy" O' Neal (AKA Resilience), is separated from her family while in pursuit of a mysterious local legend.  Using only her training and the gear on her back, Rizzy races against time, the elements and the deadly dangers of the desert to save herself, her family, as well as history.
